positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a roaring celestial whale, rendered in a bold, graphic art deco aesthetic. The whale should be swimming through a vibrant nebula of interlocking cosmic patterns, surrounded by luminous bioluminescent flora and crystalline constellations. The composition must feature a central, powerful silhouette of the whale against a dramatic gradient background of deep indigo, cosmic teal, and pops of bright gold and emerald. Use strong vector lines, geometric shapes, and high contrast for a clean, impactful print suitable for screen printing on apparel. Overhead, depict a partial moon and stylized shooting stars.
